channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mac Mini Shortage Drives Premium Resale Listings on eBay
item.description: Apple's sold-out Mac mini is generating marked-up resale listings as demand rises, fueled by its growing appeal for running local AI models.

item.title: Nuclear Startup X-Energy Surges 27% on Nasdaq Debut After Upsized IPO
item.description: Shares of nuclear power startup X-energy rose 27% on its first day of trading on the Nasdaq following a larger-than-planned initial public offering.

item.title: Two Human Embryo Editing Startups Shut Down Amid Industry Turmoil
item.description: Bootstrap Bio and Manhattan Genomics, both pursuing embryo editing to prevent serious hereditary disease, have ceased operations.

item.title: DeepMind Spinoff Isomorphic Labs Advances AI-Designed Drugs to Human Trials
item.description: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg announced the company has developed a pipeline of AI-designed drug candidates moving toward human clinical trials.

item.title: Beatbot Robotic Pool Cleaners Available at Reduced Prices for Limited Time
item.description: A selection of Beatbot robotic pool cleaners, among the top-rated models tested, are currently available at discounted prices ahead of the summer season.
